title: Vietnamese-Style Pan-Seared Barramundi with Spicy Stir Fry
description: A fusion of Vietnamese and Australian flavors, this dish combines the delicate taste of barramundi with the bold flavors of a spicy stir fry.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the barramundi fillets with salt and black pepper.
Pan-sear the barramundi for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the barramundi to a plate and set aside.
In the same skillet, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and onion and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the spicy stir-fry sauce and stir-fry for another minute.
Stir in the chopped Thai basil.
Serve the barramundi with the spicy stir fry on top.
